title: Zelensky says plans to meet China's Xi Jinping
description: The Ukrainian president also said he was doing his best to prevent Chinese arms supplies to Russia to avoid any risk of "World War III."
keywords: Volodymyr Zelensky, china, Xi Jinping, Beijing, Ukraine
snippet:
February 25, 2023 05:42 am | Updated 05:42 am IST - Kyiv, Ukraine

President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Friday he was planning to meet China's Xi Jinping after ...
